programme.title: Water Matters Ep106: Sustainable Fishing, Ocean Planning
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep104: Tiger Sharks + Night Diving With Sharks + Blacktip Sharks
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV features Tiger Sharks, night diving with Sharks, how shark’s smell, how shark coloration works and introduces us to Blue Sharks.

programme.title: Undone: Female Big-Wave Surfing
programme.desc: Undone is a remarkable story of personal endeavor following female professional surfer, Laura Enever, who leaves a top spot on the WSL Championship Tour to explore the unpredictable world of big-wave surfing. In a life altering change, Laura works to break into the male dominated sport by pursuing some of the most dangerous and remote waves on the planet.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep106: Shark Divers Part 1
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep114: Aquabike World Championship Series - Qingdao, China
programme.desc: The UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship is in Qingdao, China, for the Grand Prix of Qingdoa, featuring the Aquabike Jetski Division.

programme.title: Water Matters Ep106: Sustainable Fishing, Ocean Planning

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo One
programme.desc: On his 45th trip to Japan (since 1991), Terje rides powder in the Japanese Alps with the snowboarders Leo Cittadella, Rip Zinger, Curtis Ciszek, Oli Gittler and Ian Tobin.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo Two
programme.desc: The snowboarders Rip Zinger and Terje Haakonsen ride powder in Japan. Years after his recovery from a debilitating head injury, they get Kevin Pearce back on snow. Join us for this episode of friendship, freshies, and freeriding.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Twe12ve
programme.desc: A winter of extremes sets the stage for Twe12ve. Absinthe Films follows twelve riders chasing record snow across legendary ranges, pushing boundaries and redefining what’s possible in another wintry shred classic.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Escramble
programme.desc: In a time beyond and close to now... a vision was revealed. A vision of the very first dream of life. The dream of life before there was life. The dream that vapor dreams of becoming solid and falling to meet whatever will catch and hold it. Thus begins "ESCRAMBLE". Featuring Bjorn Leines, Terje Haakonsen, Mark Landvik, Wille Yli-Louma, Shaun White, Seth Huot, Gigi Rüf, Erik Leines, Bryan Iguchi, Chris Demolski and Jamie Lynn.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: 9191
programme.desc: 9191 is a sideways introspective into the bewildering snow-covered dreamscape of international time traveler and mystic of the shred - Gigi Rüf.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Isle Of Snow
programme.desc: Join us as we explore the snowboard world through the perspectives of the people who live it and have made it their lives follow their passions.

programme.title: The Manboys Movie
programme.desc: The boys are back with new friends and a brand new snowboard film. The Manboys Movie will definitely top your expectations. Featuring bangers from Chris Rasman, Rusty Ockenden, Craig McMorris, Jody Wachniak, Matt Belzile, Anto Chamberland, and Mark Sollors.

programme.title: The ManBoys Presents: Snowdance
programme.desc: Snowdance is a backcountry snowboarding film. Because even if you’ve never set foot in the backcountry, you can still be grateful that it’s there. Seven years and one pandemic since their fruition, The ManBoys roster still remains largely intact with Chris Rasman, Rusty Ockenden, Matt Belzile, Jody Wachniak, Beau Bishop Eric Jackson. Snowdance was filmed by Ben Webb, Connor Winton, Dave Craig, and Ryan Kenny.

programme.title: Air Time Podcast - Shin Campos
programme.desc: Shin, the timeless powder hound, has been an iconic presence since the late '80s. With a career spanning decades, he's not only witnessed, but lived through it all. From a gritty renegade in Whistler, crafting local videos with his homies, to scaling the peaks of snowboarding stardom with Tree Top, Absinthe, Standard, White Out, and more. He briefly ventured into mountain guiding but a tragic incident led him to a new path. Today, Shin orchestrates cinematic magic behind the lens, skillfully managing and producing awe-inspiring commercial shoots that dominate the sea-to-sky landscapes. Although he's moved on from professional snowboarding, his passion remains unwavering. Shin's story epitomizes passion, resilience, and evolution. Enjoy the show!

programme.title: Bloody Streetz
programme.desc: Bloody Streetz is the story of what happens when a ruthless killer for hire runs up against an African spirit and is forced to learn the errors of his ways.

programme.title: Breakdown Lane
programme.desc: When Kirby's SUV stalls in the desert, she must overcome the elements and the lurking undead to get home. Her only companion is Max, the Emergency Car Service Rep trapped in his office by the zombies.

programme.title: Caesar
programme.desc: A black white, film noir fashioned as a 40's gangster movie adaption from the classic Shakespearean stage-play 'Julius Caesar'.

programme.title: Holistay
programme.desc: Two couples, who do not know each other, double book a vacation house in San Diego and strange events begin to happen. "Things are not as they appear."

programme.title: Antisocial Behaviour
programme.desc: Jakob Kelser is a man with a horrific, troubled past. Having been failed by society and plagued by a gruesome childhood memory, he is forced to live alone in the unholy hell of God's making.

programme.title: Pillow Party Massacre
programme.desc: Haunted by a prank gone fatally wrong, five friends reunite to heal. But not all can forget, and it's clear that someone or something is out for revenge.

programme.title: Weekend Killer
programme.desc: Detective's Joey Moretti and Patricia Stevens are trying to track down a serial killer that preys on young attractive women, leaving only cryptic messages carved into their flesh as clues! Joey struggles to keep himself together as the investigation leads him closer and closer to the deranged killer!

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E03 - Cunning Copulation
programme.desc: Finding a mate, building a nest, and raising kids are all part of the whole reproductive behavior thing. But it’s not as easy as it sounds. First, you’ve got to sift through lots of possible partners to find the one with the best genes to keep your family line going. Nesting involves finding some space and then guarding it fiercely, while raising the little ones takes loads of energy as you have to feed, teach, and keep them safe until they grow up. This episode dives into the ins and outs of how creatures go about their reproductive business.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E01 - Three Stories, One Bear
programme.desc: Michigan U.S.A. conservation officers investigate a bear killed during the season's opening weekend; a suspicious bag of trash at a state park; the reason why every successful bear hunter has to turn in a tooth from his kill.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E02 - Elevated Charges
programme.desc: It's a late night for two Michigan U.S.A. conservation officers as an investigation into a hunting blind on federal property turns into much more. The area is also home to a once nearly extinct bird that is now making a comeback.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E13 - Hunt and Capture Saddam Hussein
programme.desc: Ten years ago, thousands of US and Coalition forces personnel, ranging from elite soldiers to reservists, found themselves in the middle of two conflicts that required an entirely different approach to warfare than they had previously experienced. From special forces units securing vital points of strategic interest and capturing key individuals in Afghanistan. This episode of CQB takes a close look at how special operations were integrated into regular units and how they fought through many close quarter combat situations with a combination of intelligence, high-tech weaponry and surveillance technologies to find and capture Saddam Hussein.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E01 - Wardens Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: Wardens: Case Files offers a glimpse into the remarkable stories of seasoned wildlife officers. It will transport viewers into the heart of the action, immersing them in the thrill of the chase and the satisfaction of justice served.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E09 - Bighorn Range
programme.desc: Bighorn sheep are captured and translocated in the mountains of Nevada.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E10 - Preserving A Predator
programme.desc: Conservationists capture and translocate lions across Africa to replenish a once-extinct population.

programme.title: Harry Meghan: A Very Modern Romance
programme.desc: Meghan Markle and Prince Harry share similar interests and seem like a perfect match. Both have faced tough times growing up but have come out on top. Now they're winning together. This hour-long special, featuring a chat with author Andrew Morton, explores the social backdrop that makes their bold marriage fit right in with today's British Royal Family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E35 - Prince Charles At 50 Heir To Sadness
programme.desc: After Diana's death, everyone's attention turned to Charles, who was not only a widower and a dad but also next in line for the throne. This show takes a closer look at how he got along with his sons, his longtime love Camilla, and what his future might look like as King. Royal experts David Starkey and Anthony Holden share their insights.

programme.title: Youth Topia
programme.desc: In a world driven by algorithms, a group of "forever teenagers" rebel against the dictates of self-optimization.

programme.title: Burning Beds

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Rhyme takes on a big role in the musical. Things get spooky at Ace's Halloween party.

programme.title: Chicken Girls College Years
programme.desc: It’s freshman year! As Rooney forms her new crew of “Chicken Girls,” Birdie finds her place while balancing old new friendships.

programme.title: On The Ropes
programme.desc: Jackie moves in with Sonny. Neither of them are happy about it. After making a tough decision.

programme.title: Making Out
programme.desc: A screenwriter and self-proclaimed hopeless romantic meets a beautiful actress and they decide to act out their ideal love scenarios. When real feelings start to jump off the page and become real will he tell her how he feels? They're in love, probably.

programme.title: Beach Babe Bingo
programme.desc: The water is cool and the girls are hot, what more could you want? Jump in and go for a swim, then wash up for a fun night out because the beach has nothing but sand and babes.

programme.title: Running Funny
programme.desc: Michael and Eddie are two broke college graduates who rent an “apartment” from Stan, a cantankerous blind war veteran. As they begin their tumultuous transition into the real world, they quickly discover that finding a job will be more complex than securing their degrees.

programme.title: Cabin of Errors
programme.desc: When Peter and Nancy split up, their friends plot to bring them back together during a trip to a cabin. But things go hilariously wrong when Peter comes to the cabin with other intentions. A modern day romantic comedy farce.

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: Margik is creating the future where smart OrganicLEDs enhance our quality of life

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: Mymee has developed a revolutionary technology that helps people manage their autoimmune conditions.

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: GeneproDX is transforming traditional medicine —bridging Health Tech and AI and providing patients with fast, reliable, and accurate diagnostics. GeneproDX’s patented product, ThyroidPrint, provides highly-accurate diagnosis, resulting in fewer unnecessary surgeries — saving patients from life-altering surgical outcomes.

programme.title: Hot and Sweet
programme.desc: The romantic-comedy tells the story between a pretty boy food truck owner who settles in a spot by the Gangwon beach, and the mysterious and wacky lady he meets.

programme.title: Hot and Sweet
programme.desc: The romantic-comedy tells the story between a pretty boy food truck owner who settles in a spot by the Gangwon beach, and the mysterious and wacky lady he meets.

programme.title: What Do Men Want
programme.desc: A bachelor pad, two struggling actors, Jimmy and Bob, a bunch of women, a love quadrangle, and a secret men's business. It is a coming-of-age story of two 30-something-year-old "kids" looking for meaning and love in all the wrong places.

programme.title: What Do Men Want

programme.title: 190 Lorimer

programme.title: 190 Lorimer

programme.title: Holy Driver
programme.desc: A casual introduction into the life of The Holy Driver

programme.title: Holy Driver
programme.desc: Father Mike has a sit down with Donny, a Mob Capo and Carl, an undercover cop. He tells them that he and some other priests want to clean house and that they need their help to dispose of a pedophile priest. Things really hit home hard.

programme.title: Black Cobra 3: The Manila Connection
programme.desc: A shipment of American weapons is stolen in the Philippines. An American named Hawkins tries to find the weapons. Hawkins ends up dead. Chicago policeman Bob Malone is called in to... See more »

programme.title: Bloody Streetz
programme.desc: Bloody Streetz is the story of what happens when a ruthless killer for hire runs up against an African spirit and is forced to learn the errors of his ways.

programme.title: Breakdown Lane
programme.desc: When Kirby's SUV stalls in the desert, she must overcome the elements and the lurking undead to get home. Her only companion is Max, the Emergency Car Service Rep trapped in his office by the zombies.

programme.title: Caesar
programme.desc: A black white, film noir fashioned as a 40's gangster movie adaption from the classic Shakespearean stage-play 'Julius Caesar'.

programme.title: The Steel Claw
programme.desc: A disabled ex-Marine returns to WWII Philippines for a hazardous rescue mission, relying on a steel prosthetic hand and local guerrilla allies.

programme.title: Night of the Living Dead
programme.desc: There is panic throughout the nation as the dead suddenly come back to life.

programme.title: Hell's Angels
programme.desc: Two British brothers fly in WWI’s fiercest battles, face betrayal over a lover, and sacrifice everything amid sky-high spectacle and tragedy.

programme.title: DOA
programme.desc: Frank Bigelow, told he's been poisoned and has only a few days to live, tries to find out who killed him and why

programme.title: Gung Ho
programme.desc: The true story of Carlson's Raiders and their World War II attack on Makin Island

programme.title: Scarlet Street
programme.desc: A man in mid-life crisis befriends a young woman, though her l fiancé persuades her to con him out of the fortune they mistakenly assume he possesses

programme.title: Rage at Dawn
programme.desc: A special agent from Chicago is sent out west to bring in the notorious Reno brothers

programme.title: Your Label Is Lying
programme.desc: This sermon is for someone who has been hearing the same lies from the enemy for so long that you’ve started to believe them. But you are not your issue. You are not your bad decision. It’s time to interrupt your story with truth and leave the lies behind, because the Word says otherwise.

programme.title: The War Of Whispers
programme.desc: Ever feel like there are too many voices telling you what to do and who to be? The enemy whispers fear, doubt, and distraction, but God’s whisper brings peace, purpose, and direction. When you stop agreeing with the enemy’s lies and start trusting the whisper of the One who sent you, you’ll find confidence in where — and who — you are.

programme.title: This Is Then
programme.desc: Some things look “stupid” to the world… until God uses them to change everything. If you’ve been holding back because you need everything to make sense, this will call you to trust what God promised and practice gratitude in the hard place.

programme.title: God Prompts
programme.desc: We often ask God to do what we want, but faith starts with doing what He says. When you trust God as your good Father and follow His prompting, even small steps can unlock something big.

programme.title: How To Surrender To God
programme.desc: God isn’t afraid of your struggle. In fact, He’s inviting you to face it, because He knows what’s on the other side. Stop running, hold onto Him, and let Him change you from the inside out.

programme.title: Hand Him The Plan
programme.desc: Sometimes the battle in your mind is proof that God’s trying to do something great in your heart. What you see isn’t the full picture of what God has for you. When you hand God your plans, you make room for His purpose.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto, narrates in detail what happened years ago. He lies blatantly, Torrealba thinks he wants to blame his wife for having been unfaithful to him. Camila reproaches Mother Isabel harshly. Rosa cannot appear because they want to kill her. Axel, disappointed because Amelia hid the paternity of his son from him.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Convinced that Fernanda is behind the death of the late Rosendo's horse, Hilario warns Florencia that her half-sister plans to involve her in her traps; Hilario is sure that someone else is receiving money from Fernanda to frame Victoria in General's death. Federico tries to impose himself in Los Samanes and go over Nicolás' orders, he makes it clear to him that he is just another pawn within the hacienda. Florencia unburdens herself with Fernanda, because she knows that Nicolás would not leave her for Victoria but because he does not really love her; however, Nicolás contacts his aunt to let her know that he will look for Florencia. Moncho notifies Hilario of his resignation as foreman of Cantarrana. Sergio receives a visit from Victoria, who has changed her mind, because although she does not want to hurt Sergio, she is determined to forget Nicolás del Casal for good.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Committed to forget Nicolás Del Casal, Victoria decides to reciprocate the love Sergio offers her, although Sergio believes that the young Guanipa is not yet ready to fall in love again. Florencia wants to make sure that Nicolás did not believe Victoria when she claimed to have been a victim of the late Rosendo Zapata, who in life wanted to abuse her. Hilario is overcome with sadness as he wanders through the nooks and crannies of the Cantarrana hacienda, where he remembers being a man that everyone respected and of whom now only the remains are left. At nightfall, Fernanda leans on Leopoldo to impose a punishment on his daughter Eugenia for having lied to him; Eugenia tries to manipulate her father, as she begs him to let her leave, but the young Alcoy is forced to stay at home. Nicolás is approached by his wife, who wants to attend an event that Nicolás refuses to go to, but suddenly changes his mind when he learns that the event is none other than the same art auction to which Sergio invited Victoria.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Guillermo tells Lorena that if she does not kill Marco Aurelio Corona, she will never see her son again. Lorena returns to Lucas and informs him that she was unable to kill him. As fate would have it, Lorena and Alberto meet again. Alberto is shocked to recognize Lorena and wonders how she ended up being his father's personal nurse.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Claudio gives instructions to Pedro about the new plan to kill his brother. In an attempt to recover the million dollars that a third party collected with the stolen check, Ricardo and Paulina go before the bank manager who confirms that the operation was clean and cannot be reversed. Lorena receives a package from her husband.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: To Pastora and Edilio's displeasure, Cirilo accepts Israel's offer, they will manage the Santa Maria's empire together.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: In a mixture of enjoyment and pain, Pastora sees Cirilo's corpse lying in the morgue.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricia y María Amelia habían denunciado el crimen de la muerte de Leoncio. Torrealba las enfrenta pues quiere saber cómo fue que Rosa mató a Leoncio. Patricia, desesperada, bebe sin freno. Ante su descontrol, el detective, capcioso, duda de ella.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En las cartas que entregó Henry a Max, Rosa Blanco dice que le arrebataron a su hija y Camila, muy ansiosa, cree que, al fin sabrá por qué su mamá la abandonó. Marcelina encuentra la caja con las cartas y al saber el contenido, alterada, ordena que las quemen.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En la cena, el tema principal será Rosa Blanco. Ezequiel dice que esa mujer fue una oportunista que enamoró y se aprovechó de su hermano menor, Leoncio. Astrid ofende agregando que fue una prostituta, culpable de la guerra entre las dos familias por su relación con Augusto Aragón y también con Leoncio López.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insiste en saber sobre su relación familiar, piensa que pueda ser prima de Max. Ezequiel quiere despejar la duda de que podría ser su sobrina, interroga a la Madre Isabel que niega saberlo y también recurre a Marcelina que se lo confirma. Camila, protege a Chantal, una niña que vende flores.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Camila en idílicos momentos sin importar ní el resultado del A.D.N. Continúan en la búsqueda de Rosa Blanco. Dos encomiendas entregadas por un mensajero, una para los López Méndez y otra para los Aragón, confirman la reaparición de El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa de El Jagüey, Madre Isabel no los deja entrar, conocen a Henry y presumen que también pueda ser hijo de Rosa Blanco. Max piensa que algo grave

programme.title: Morirse En Domingo
programme.desc: Julio Salas muere tras una larga enfermedad, pero es domingo y su familia por dificultades económicas se ve forzada a contratar los servicios de una modesta agencia funeraria.

programme.title: Hienas
programme.desc: Luis ha metido la pata... hasta el fondo. Pero Pepe está ahí para ayudarlo... a caer. Ninguno de los dos tenía idea del grandísimo lío en el que andaban metidos ya desde hacía tiempo. Una liada de cojones.

programme.title: El Secreto Oculto
programme.desc: Describe los eventos del fin de los tiempos de la humanidad profetizada por místicos y Santos sobre los 3 días de oscuridad en que los demonios serán soldados ...

programme.desc: Un loro que tras ser vendido a unos traficantes de animales cuando era pequeño, va pasando de dueño en dueño durante toda su vida y cambiando su nombre de acuerdo a su propietario, mirando frente a sus ojos la evolución de Venezuela durante 50 años (1950/2000).

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: Martí Noticias
programme.desc: En Martí Noticias News te traemos las últimas novedades globales, ofreciendo una cobertura y análisis en profundidad de los temas más apremiantes.
